title: GGUF conversion + structural sanity, pruned v4 judge (judge-only)
llamacpp_build: version: 1 (8f114a9) built with GNU 13.3.0 for Linux aarch64
b9180_floor_note: PKG4-01 pins >=b9180 (MTP conversion support for Qwen3.5/3.6); recorded build is past it

sanity.mtp_layer_note: blk.40 (the MTP/nextn layer) retains its original 256 experts -- the Phase 26 prune surgery deliberately left mtp.*/shared_expert.* tensors untouched. The gguf metadata expert_count=224 (read from blk.0) matches config.json text_config.num_experts and is the value both sanity checks assert against; blk.40's 256-expert shape is expected, not a mismatch.

size_vs_projection.note: 33.6 is a PROJECTION and is recorded here only to close it out against the measurement; the measured value is the only one any downstream doc or card may cite. The measured Q8 (31.21 GiB) came in SMALLER than the linear-scaling projection -- likely because the projection scaled from the unpruned 37.8 GiB Q8 estimate by expert-count ratio alone and did not account for the untouched-size MTP layer and shared-expert tensors being a fixed (non-scaling) overhead fraction.

v3_comparison.note: recorded per the 2026-07-17 user directive: size-vs-v3 is a NOTE, not a ship gate
